1d:T9e5,
# React Hooks 深入理解

React Hooks 是现代 React 开发的基础，让我们深入理解它们。

## useState：状态管理

基础用法：

```tsx
const [count, setCount] = useState(0)

// 函数式更新
setCount(prev => prev + 1)

// 惰性初始化（复杂初始值）
const [data, setData] = useState(() => {
  const saved = localStorage.getItem('data')
  return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : null
})
```

## useEffect：副作用处理

清理副作用：

```tsx
useEffect(() => {
  const handleResize = () => setWidth(window.innerWidth)
  
  window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize)
  
  // 清理函数
  return () => {
    window.removeEventListener('resize', handleResize)
  }
}, []) // 空依赖数组 = 仅运行一次
```

### 依赖数组技巧

```tsx
// ❌ 每次渲染都执行
useEffect(() => {
  console.log('Running')
})

// ✅ 仅在 count 变化时执行
useEffect(() => {
  console.log('Count changed:', count)
}, [count])

// ✅ 组件卸载时清理
useEffect(() => {
  const subscription = api.subscribe()
  return () => subscription.unsubscribe()
}, [])
```

## useMemo：记忆化计算

避免昂贵的计算：

```tsx
const sortedItems = useMemo(() => {
  return items
    .filter(item => item.active)
    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
}, [items]) // 仅在 items 变化时重新计算
```

## useCallback：稳定函数引用

避免子组件不必要地重新渲染：

```tsx
const handleClick = useCallback((id: string) => {
  setSelected(id)
}, []) // 空依赖 = 函数永远不变

// 配合 useEffect
const handleClick = useCallback((id: string) => {
  console.log('Clicked:', id)
}, [id]) // id 变化时函数更新
```

## useRef：可变引用

访问 DOM 和存储可变值：

```tsx
const inputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)

useEffect(() => {
  inputRef.current?.focus()
}, [])

// 存储不触发渲染的值
const countRef = useRef(0)
countRef.current++ // 不会触发重新渲染
```

## 自定义 Hook

提取可复用的逻辑：

```tsx
function useLocalStorage<T>(key: string, initialValue: T) {
  const [value, setValue] = useState<T>(() => {
    if (typeof window === 'undefined') return initialValue
    const saved = localStorage.getItem(key)
    return saved ? JSON.parse(saved) : initialValue
  })

  useEffect(() => {
    localStorage.setItem(key, JSON.stringify(value))
  }, [key, value])

  return [value, setValue] as const
}
```

## 总结

掌握这些 Hook 是 React 开发的关键，它们是函数组件强大而灵活的基础。1a:["$","div",null,{"className":"animate-slide-up","style":{"animationDelay":"0.1s"},"children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"h-px gradient-btn mb-12"}],["$","$L1c",null,{"source":"$1d"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"h-px gradient-btn mt-12"}]]}]
1b:["$","footer",null,{"className":"mt-12 pt-8 border-t border-border/50 animate-slide-up","style":{"animationDelay":"0.2s"},"children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start sm:items-center justify-between gap-4","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm text-muted-foreground","children":"感谢阅读，欢迎分享！"}],["$","$L2",null,{"href":"/","className":"gradient-btn text-white px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg font-medium inline-flex items-center gap-2","children":[["$","svg",null,{"ref":"$undefined","xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","width":24,"height":24,"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","strokeWidth":2,"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","className":"lucide lucide-arrow-left w-4 h-4","aria-hidden":"true","children":[["$","path","1l729n",{"d":"m12 19-7-7 7-7"}],["$","path","x3x0zl",{"d":"M19 12H5"}],"$undefined"]}],"返回首页"]}]]}]}]
11:[["$","meta","0",{"charSet":"utf-8"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"viewport","content":"width=device-width, initial-scale=1"}]]
